handoff_inputs.purpose: Reviewed API source contract staged with the trusted executor package.
Reviewed non-secret runtime input values staged with the trusted executor package.
Machine-readable expected steps, bindings, credentials, control flow, and side-effect hints.
Generation/refinement attempts, failed checks, and stop reason.
Machine-readable review handoff manifest for reviewer or orchestrator routing.
Human review evidence, unresolved risks, skipped execution notes, and trusted-runner command text.
Source brief, integration policy, runtime policy, credentials policy, safety boundary, and fallback behavior.
Structured intent extracted from the project brief.
Public UWS HCL document produced from intent.
Public UWS YAML artifact validated against the public UWS schema and local execution-profile checks.

approval_states.name: generated
approval_states.meaning: Artifacts were emitted; no approval is implied.

approval_states.name: validated
approval_states.meaning: Required validators and quality gates passed, or known warnings are attached.

approval_states.name: review_required
approval_states.meaning: Human review is required before side-effectful execution.

approval_states.name: approved_for_sandbox
approval_states.meaning: A reviewer approved sandbox or test-endpoint execution only.

approval_states.name: approved_for_production
approval_states.meaning: A reviewer approved production execution through a trusted runner and approved credentials.

approval_states.name: rejected
approval_states.meaning: A reviewer rejected the artifact or requested regeneration.
